title: Costs due clerks or other officials
doc_html:
§328.  Costs due clerks or other officials

In all cases in which there are costs due any clerk, sheriff, parish recorder or other officer, they shall be allowed as in other cases upon the officer making a specific bill of costs certified under oath.

§328.  Costs due clerks or other officials
In all cases in which there are costs due any clerk, sheriff, parish recorder or other officer, they shall be allowed as in other cases upon the officer making a specific bill of costs certified under oath.
